message:
refactor(web): replace wildcard imports with explicit imports

Replace #[allow(clippy::wildcard_imports)] use super::* patterns
across all web/ submodules with explicit, targeted imports. This
eliminates implicit dependency coupling and makes each module's
actual requirements visible at a glance.

Affected modules: error.rs, handlers.rs, middleware.rs, router.rs,
server.rs, sse.rs, and the parent web.rs import reformat.

Each module now imports only the specific types, functions, and
constants it actually uses, following the strangler-fig migration
pattern established for Wave 4B (ft-1zej2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
